title: cartographer: sync roadmap docs with active tree-sitter shadow foundation 🗺️
summary: Updated `ROADMAP.md` and `docs/implementation-plan.md` to reflect that the Tree-sitter AST shadow foundation (Phase 7 / ADR-0008) has begun and landed behind a feature flag (`ast`). Also removed hallucinatory Adze AST integration references.
proof_summary: Verified by grep and reading `crates/tokmd-analysis/Cargo.toml` and `ROADMAP.md` which showed the shadow foundation in-tree but the docs lagging.
